_comment: Copy this to ~/memory-wiki/wiki-config.json and edit for your setup. Safe default: delete the example rules and leave arrays empty — everything classifies as 'general'.

projects._comment: When a MEMORY.md entry's name or description matches any of these keywords (case-insensitive), migrate to ~/memory-wiki/projects/<slug>/ instead of global/

_behavioralKeywordsComment: Keywords that route 'type: user' memory entries to global/preferences/ instead of global/entities/. Leave the array empty to use the built-in defaults (pattern, cognitive, behavioral, habit). Add your own personal vocabulary (e.g. 'energy', 'focus', 'vices') to classify more aggressively.
